description: You are the DevOps lead at Meridian Payments, a fintech startup migrating to a microservices architecture. Configure the Artifactory instance (http://localhost:8082, credentials: admin/password) to support the new platform. Create a local Maven repository named 'ms-releases' with the description 'Microservice release artifacts - Meridian Payments' as the authoritative store for internal JARs. Set up a remote Maven repository named 'maven-central-proxy' to proxy https://repo1.maven.org/maven2. Create a virtual Maven repository named 'ms-build-virtual' aggregating both, ensuring 'ms-releases' appears before 'maven-central-proxy' in the repository order. Finally, create a group named 'build-engineers' for the CI/CD platform team and
